title: 10 best herbal essential oils for knee swelling
description: Arnica montana, also known as mountain arnica, essential oils helps with knee swelling because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. It contains compounds like sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and promote healing in damaged tissues. This natural remedy is often used to alleviate swelling, pain, and stiffness associated with knee injuries and arthritis.
